summary.note: This manifest records a point-in-time Gate B readiness package only. It never authorizes active-role-only cutover by itself, and Task 8 remains the separate cutover authority.

notes: Frontend evidence covers the active-role REST carriers that remain in scope for Gate B packaging.
This slice does not grant cutover authority; it only declares the carrier inventory that must be backed by explicit point-in-time zero-mismatch / zero-legacy evidence plus tests.
user-service remains the authority surface for active-role lifecycle and introspection evidence.
Gate B readiness requires explicit point-in-time zero-mismatch / zero-legacy evidence plus green certification tests before cutover review can proceed.
feedback-service evidence stays limited to the migrated feedback routes covered by the TS Gate B certification tests.
The slice inventory is packaging-only and keeps cutover authorization disabled.
